# HELP benchmark_bytes_per_second The current throughput in bytes per second
# TYPE benchmark_bytes_per_second gauge
benchmark_bytes_per_second{path="root.output.processors.0"} 9.5392e+07
# HELP benchmark_bytes_total The total number of bytes processed
# TYPE benchmark_bytes_total counter
benchmark_bytes_total 4.12e+09
# HELP benchmark_messages_per_second The current throughput in messages per second
# TYPE benchmark_messages_per_second gauge
benchmark_messages_per_second{path="root.output.processors.0"} 75000
# HELP benchmark_messages_total The total number of messages processed
# TYPE benchmark_messages_total counter
benchmark_messages_total 3.25e+06
# HELP go_gc_duration_seconds A summary of the pause duration of garbage collection cycles.
# TYPE go_gc_duration_seconds summary
go_gc_duration_seconds{quantile="0"} 1.2e-05
go_gc_duration_seconds{quantile="0.25"} 1.8e-05
go_gc_duration_seconds{quantile="0.5"} 2.4e-05
go_gc_duration_seconds{quantile="0.75"} 3.6e-05
go_gc_duration_seconds{quantile="1"} 0.000812
go_gc_duration_seconds_sum 0.042
go_gc_duration_seconds_count 312
# HELP go_goroutines Number of goroutines that currently exist.
# TYPE go_goroutines gauge
go_goroutines 312
# HELP go_info Information about the Go environment.
# TYPE go_info gauge
go_info{version="go1.23.4"} 1
# HELP go_memstats_alloc_bytes Number of bytes allocated and still in use.
# TYPE go_memstats_alloc_bytes gauge
go_memstats_alloc_bytes 6.2914e+07
# HELP go_memstats_gc_pause_total_ns Cumulative nanoseconds in GC stop-the-world pauses since program start.
# TYPE go_memstats_gc_pause_total_ns counter
go_memstats_gc_pause_total_ns 4.2e+07
# HELP go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes Number of heap bytes allocated and still in use.
# TYPE go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes gauge
go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes 6.2914e+07
# HELP go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes Number of heap bytes that are in use.
# TYPE go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes gauge
go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes 1.04857e+08
# HELP go_memstats_heap_objects Number of allocated objects.
# TYPE go_memstats_heap_objects gauge
go_memstats_heap_objects 421932
# HELP go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes Number of heap bytes obtained from system.
# TYPE go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes gauge
go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes 1.34218e+08
# HELP go_threads Number of OS threads created.
# TYPE go_threads gauge
go_threads 18
# HELP process_cpu_seconds_total Total user and system CPU time spent in seconds.
# TYPE process_cpu_seconds_total counter
process_cpu_seconds_total 87.4
# HELP process_max_fds Maximum number of open file descriptors.
# TYPE process_max_fds gauge
process_max_fds 1048576
# HELP process_open_fds Number of open file descriptors.
# TYPE process_open_fds gauge
process_open_fds 64
# HELP process_resident_memory_bytes Resident memory size in bytes.
# TYPE process_resident_memory_bytes gauge
process_resident_memory_bytes 1.45e+08
# HELP process_start_time_seconds Start time of the process since unix epoch in seconds.
# TYPE process_start_time_seconds gauge
process_start_time_seconds 1.747856e+09
# HELP process_virtual_memory_bytes Virtual memory size in bytes.
# TYPE process_virtual_memory_bytes gauge
process_virtual_memory_bytes 2.1e+09
